title: chamaecrista fragilis
intro: Chamaecrista fragilis, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a small annual or perennial plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Chamaecrista fragilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
